frase_original: If you're about to take a risk--one that comes from within, one that expresses your true nature, that brings up fear after fear after fear--you know what to do. One: do the work, create the value. Two: draw the people that encourage you closer. They're the only ones that matter.

texto: Success and failure come and go, but don't let them define you. It's who you are that matters.
explicacao: Citação de Kamal Ravikant sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Success and failure come and go, but don't let them define you. It's who you are that matters.” articula sucesso, coragem, entrepreneurship em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como entrepreneurship e failure.

texto: The simple act of putting your truth on paper, only you and your thoughts, is one of the most powerful exercises you can do.

texto: Whatever human endeavor we choose, as long as we live our truth, it is success.

texto: You cannot stay at the same level as when you first practiced your truth, life won't let you.

texto: Ask yourself: what is it, that if I believed it down to my core, would change everything?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kamal Ravikant que provoca temas ligados a lideranca. Ao questionar “Ask yourself: what is it, that if I believed it down to my core, would change everything?”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre lideranca, change, confidence, com foco em mudanca e confidence.
